post0.title: Overview and visualization of spatial-level transforms from albumentations package
post0.content: Image augmentation is a machine learning technique that "boomed" in recent years along with the large deep learning systems. In this article, we present a visualization of spatial-level augmentation techniques available in the albumentations. . The provided descriptions mostly come the official project documentation available at https://albumentations.ai/ . Some of the transformations can only be applied to images, others also to bboxes and keypoints, the below table (from https://github.com/albumentations-team/albumentations#spatial-level-transforms) describes it in detail . Transform Image Masks BBoxes Keypoints . CenterCrop | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . CoarseDropout | ✓ | ✓ | | | . Crop | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . CropNonEmptyMaskIfExists | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . ElasticTransform | ✓ | ✓ | | | . Flip | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . GridDistortion | ✓ | ✓ | | | . GridDropout | ✓ | ✓ | | | . HorizontalFlip | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . IAAAffine | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . IAACropAndPad | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . IAAFliplr | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . IAAFlipud | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . IAAPerspective | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . IAAPiecewiseAffine | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . Lambda | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . LongestMaxSize | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . MaskDropout | ✓ | ✓ | | | . NoOp | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . OpticalDistortion | ✓ | ✓ | | | . PadIfNeeded | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . RandomCrop | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . RandomCropNearBBox | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . RandomGridShuffle | ✓ | ✓ | | | . RandomResizedCrop | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . RandomRotate90 | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . RandomScale | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . RandomSizedBBoxSafeCrop | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | | . RandomSizedCrop | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . Resize | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . Rotate | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . ShiftScaleRotate | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . SmallestMaxSize | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . Transpose | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . VerticalFlip | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | ✓ | . Image that will be transformed . from os.path import join from PIL import Image import numpy as np . path = join("lime_image", "husky_train", "47.jpg") img = Image.open(path) img = img.resize((384, 384)) img . image = np.asarray(img) . CenterCrop . Crop the central part of the input. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import CenterCrop height, width = 200, 200 transform = CenterCrop(height, width, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . CoarseDropout . CoarseDropout of the rectangular regions in the image. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import CoarseDropout max_holes=10 max_height=50 max_width=8 min_holes=1 min_height=None min_width=None fill_value=255 mask_fill_value=None transform =CoarseDropout(max_holes, max_height, max_width, min_holes, min_height, min_width, fill_value, mask_fill_value, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . Crop . Crop region from image. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import Crop x_min=0 y_min=0 x_max=384 y_max=200 transform =Crop(x_min, y_min, x_max, y_max, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . ElasticTransform . Elastic deformation of images as described in [Simard2003]_ (with modifications). Based on https://gist.github.com/erniejunior/601cdf56d2b424757de5 . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import ElasticTransform alpha=10 sigma=150 alpha_affine=50 interpolation=1 border_mode=4 value=17 mask_value=105 transform = ElasticTransform (alpha, sigma, alpha_affine, interpolation, border_mode, value, mask_value, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . Flip . Flip the input either horizontally, vertically or both horizontally and vertically. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import Flip transform = Flip(p=1.0) d=-1 augmented_image = transform(image=image, d=d)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . GridDistortion . Add distorition to the image, not really well documanted, hyperparameters are not clear for me . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import GridDistortion num_steps=50 distort_limit=0.5 interpolation=1 border_mode=4 value=None mask_value=None transform = GridDistortion(num_steps, distort_limit, interpolation, border_mode, value, mask_value, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . GridDropout . GridDropout, drops out rectangular regions of an image and the corresponding mask in a grid fashion. . Inspired by Chen et al. paper from 2020, avalible here: https://arxiv.org/pdf/2001.04086.pdf . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import GridDropout ratio=0.4 unit_size_min=2 unit_size_max=19 holes_number_x= 10 holes_number_y= 10 shift_x=100 shift_y=0 random_offset=False transform = GridDropout(ratio, unit_size_min, unit_size_max, holes_number_x, holes_number_y, shift_x, shift_y, random_offset, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . HorizontalFlip . Flip the input horizontally around the y-axis. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import HorizontalFlip transform = HorizontalFlip(p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . IAAAffine . Place a regular grid of points on the input and randomly move the neighbourhood of these point around via affine transformations. . from albumentations.imgaug.transforms import IAAAffine scale=0.1 translate_percent=10 translate_px=None rotate=0.5 shear=0.5 order=1 cval=0 mode='reflect' transform = IAAAffine(scale, translate_percent, translate_px, rotate, shear, order, cval, mode, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . IAAAdditiveGaussianNoise . Add gaussian noise to the input image. . from albumentations.imgaug.transforms import IAAAdditiveGaussianNoise loc=50 scale=(5, 12.75) per_channel=True transform = IAAAdditiveGaussianNoise(loc, scale, per_channel, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . IAAEmboss . Emboss the input image and overlays the result with the original image. . from albumentations.imgaug.transforms import IAAEmboss alpha=(0.2, 0.5) strength=(0.2, 0.7) transform = IAAEmboss(alpha, strength, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . IAAPerspective . Perform a random four point perspective transform of the input. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import Flip transform = Flip(p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . IAAPiecewiseAffine . Perform a random four point perspective transform of the input. . from albumentations.imgaug.transforms import IAAPerspective scale=(0.3, 0.1) keep_size=True transform = IAAPerspective(scale, keep_size, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . IAASharpen . Sharpen the input image and overlays the result with the original image. . from albumentations.imgaug.transforms import IAAPerspective alpha=(0.1, 0.3) lightness=(0.1, 1.0) transform = IAAPerspective(alpha, lightness, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . IAASuperpixels . Completely or partially transform the input image to its superpixel representation. Uses skimage's version of the SLIC algorithm. May be slow. . from albumentations.imgaug.transforms import IAASuperpixels p_replace=0.5 n_segments=10 transform = IAASuperpixels(p_replace, n_segments, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . LongestMaxSize . Rescale an image so that maximum side is equal to max_size, keeping the aspect ratio of the initial image. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import LongestMaxSize transform = LongestMaxSize(max_size=512, interpolation=1, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . OpticalDistortion . No description, hyperparameters not clear . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import OpticalDistortion distort_limit=2.5 shift_limit=0.9 interpolation=1 border_mode=4 value=None mask_value=None transform = OpticalDistortion(distort_limit, shift_limit, interpolation, border_mode, value, mask_value, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . RandomCrop . Crop a random part of the input. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import RandomCrop height, width = 300, 200 transform = RandomCrop(height, width, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . RandomGridShuffle . Random shuffle grid's cells on image. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import RandomGridShuffle transform = RandomGridShuffle(grid=(4, 3), p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . RandomResizedCrop . Torchvision's variant of crop a random part of the input and rescale it to some size. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import RandomResizedCrop height, width = 384, 384 scale=(0.08, 1.0) ratio=(0.75, 1.3333333333333333) interpolation=1 transform = RandomResizedCrop(height, width, scale, ratio, interpolation, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . RandomRotate90 . Randomly rotate the input by 90 degrees zero or more times. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import RandomRotate90 transform = RandomRotate90(p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . RandomScale . Randomly resize the input. Output image size is different from the input image size. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import RandomScale scale_limit=0.5 interpolation=1 transform = RandomScale(scale_limit, interpolation, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . RandomSizedCrop . Crop a random part of the input and rescale it to some size. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import RandomSizedCrop min_max_height = (150, 250) height = 384 width = 384 w2h_ratio = 0.5 interpolation=1 transform = RandomSizedCrop(min_max_height, height, width, w2h_ratio, interpolation, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . Resize . Resize the input to the given height and width. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import Resize height, width = 200, 200 transform = Resize(height, width, interpolation=1, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . Rotate . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import Rotate limit=90 interpolation=1 border_mode=4 value=None mask_value=None transform = Rotate(limit, interpolation, border_mode, value, mask_value, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . ShiftScaleRotate . Rescale an image so that minimum side is equal to max_size, keeping the aspect ratio of the initial image. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import ShiftScaleRotate shift_limit=0.0625 scale_limit=0.5 rotate_limit=90 interpolation=1 transform = ShiftScaleRotate(shift_limit, scale_limit, rotate_limit, interpolation, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . SmallestMaxSize . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import SmallestMaxSize max_size=500 interpolation=1 transform = SmallestMaxSize (max_size, interpolation, p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . Transpose . Transpose the input by swapping rows and columns. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import Transpose transform = Transpose(p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) . VerticalFlip . Flip the input vertically around the x-axis. . from albumentations.augmentations.transforms import VerticalFlip transform = VerticalFlip(p=1.0) augmented_image = transform(image=image)['image'] Image.fromarray(augmented_image) .
